title: Planning for Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Guidance from the Australian Signals Directorate's ACSC to prepare organisations for post-quantum cryptography, with advice on transition timelines, milestones, and a framework to map the transition.

title: Stay Ahead of the Quantum Threat with Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: News item from the Australian Signals Directorate's ACSC announcing updated advice to help organisations plan and prepare for post-quantum cryptography.

title: The Quantum Safe Transition
summary: Report from CSIRO, Australia's national science agency, on the quantum-safe transition, covering requirements for government agencies to begin testing quantum-safe systems.
